name: Climbo API
description: Climbo 2.0 is a white-label review management platform that helps businesses collect, manage, and showcase online reviews. The API provides both Agency Mode and Clients Mode endpoints for managing clients, locations, reviews, templates, campaigns, contacts, and feedback.
